sourceTitle: AI Detection Software Guidance - Office of the Executive Vice President and Provost
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Submitting student work (even if it is anonymized) into any AI Detection Software (or any other third-party software) without a University contract or purchase order in place may be a violation of that student’s copyright and intellectual property rights.
